name: Princess Ariel Kids' Hooded Blanket - The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™
description: Take bedtime or movie night under the sea with this Princess Ariel Kids' Hooded Blanket from The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™. Made from soft 100% recycled PET material, this hooded blanket features a built-in Princess Ariel hair hood with a starfish bow and matching mittens. This soft blanket is great for snuggling and playing and helps keep your young Disney fan warm during all of their enchanted adventures.
